steps.title: Count the exposed faces
steps.content: The box has no lid, so its exterior surface area includes $5$ square faces. Each square face has side length $52$ centimeters.

steps.title: Find the area in square centimeters
steps.content:
The area of one face is
$$52^2=2{,}704$$
For $5$ faces, the total area is
$$5(2{,}704)=13{,}520$$

steps.title: Convert to square meters
steps.content:
Since $1$ meter is $100$ centimeters, $1$ square meter is $10{,}000$ square centimeters.
$$\frac{13{,}520}{10{,}000}=1.352$$
The answer is 1.352.
